  "findings": [
    "No ladder or safe means of egress located within 25 feet of lateral travel for workers in the trench."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt work inside the trench.",
    "Install a compliant ladder or ramp providing safe egress within the 25-foot lateral travel limit before allowing workers to re-enter."
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1926 Subpart P requires a safe means of egress (such as a ladder, stairway, or ramp) in trench excavations that are 4 feet or more in depth, positioned so as to require no more than 25 feet of lateral travel for employees.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.651(c)(2)"
  ]
}
